privileged_info_summary: Verified the setup_task.sh and verifier.py scripts. Confirmed the task uses synthetically generated data to populate JStock watchlists and portfolios with existing transactions (AAPL, MSFT, NVDA). The task requires the agent to add a new transaction for Meta Platforms (META) with 50 units at $490.00 per share on February 1, 2024. The programmatic verifier is a stub that relies entirely on external VLM evaluation to verify GUI state.
